brief: A character realises a terrible truth — dolly zoom à la Vertigo.
Two fighters frozen mid-strike, camera arcs 180 around them.
Building collapses in slow motion, debris floating.
Whip pan transition from runner to pursuer.
Overhead bird's-eye shot of dancers forming geometric patterns.
Dutch angle close-up of villain's smirk.
Tilt-shift miniature effect on a busy city street.
Long tracking shot down a hotel corridor.
FPV drone weaving between mountain peaks.
Kaleidoscope visual transition into a dream sequence.
